evidence: File is 2 lines total: a single sentence pointing to AGENTS.md with no build/run instructions, test instructions, architecture overview, or prerequisites

evidence: CLAUDE.md contains only 'When contributing to this repository, you must strictly follow all guidelines outlined in the AGENTS.md file.' — all project context is stored in AGENTS.md rather than the standard CLAUDE.md entry point
description: CLAUDE.md delegates all project context to AGENTS.md; agents relying on CLAUDE.md as the project entry point receive no architectural guidance
suggested_fix: Inline key sections (architecture, build/run, test, prerequisites) into CLAUDE.md, or at minimum add @AGENTS.md import so Claude Code auto-loads it
